description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with maroon and black accents. The shoe has a mesh panel on the sides and tongue for breathability, and visible plastic lace supports in maroon and black. The midsole is a combination of white, maroon, and black, with a visible air unit in the heel for cushioning. The heel features a circular logo patch with the text 'PARIS' and 'SAINT-GERMAIN' surrounding a Jumpman logo, indicating a collaboration between Jordan Brand and Paris Saint-Germain. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort and support.
description: A white, maroon, and black high-top sneaker with mesh panels, plastic lace supports, and a Paris Saint-Germain x Jordan Brand logo on the heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white laces, mesh tongue, and black Jumpman logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the mesh side panel, maroon and black lace supports, and visible air unit in the midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the circular Paris Saint-Germain x Jumpman logo patch on the heel and maroon heel tab.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the mesh panel, lace supports, and maroon midsole accent.
attribute_logo: Circular Paris Saint-Germain x Jumpman logo patch on the heel in black and white; white Jumpman logo on the tongue.
